starry_unigraph.data.sample_config module

SampleConfig: Configuration for sampling passed to chunk.materialize().

Task adapters return SampleConfig to specify what to sample for each chunk. This decouples task-specific sampling logic from graph mode implementation.

class starry_unigraph.data.sample_config.SampleConfig(pos_src: ~torch.Tensor | None = None, pos_dst: ~torch.Tensor | None = None, neg_strategy: str = 'none', neg_ratio: int = 1, target_nodes: ~torch.Tensor | None = None, target_labels: ~torch.Tensor | None = None, num_neighbors: ~typing.List[int] = <factory>, num_layers: int = 2, sample_type: str = 'temporal', extra: ~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any] = <factory>)[source]

Bases: object

Configuration passed to chunk.materialize() to control sampling.

Fields are task-specific and optional: - EdgePredict uses pos_src/pos_dst for edge pairs - NodeRegress/Classify use target_nodes/target_labels - All modes use num_neighbors/num_layers for GNN fanout

extra: Dict[str, Any]
neg_ratio: int = 1
neg_strategy: str = 'none'
num_layers: int = 2
num_neighbors: List[int]
pos_dst: Tensor | None = None
pos_src: Tensor | None = None
sample_type: str = 'temporal'
target_labels: Tensor | None = None
target_nodes: Tensor | None = None
